message:
Add batch SIMD string column export, keep WasmString for deferred conversion

Added doc_read_column_str_utf16 (Zig) for SIMD batch string→UTF-16
conversion. Testing showed eager JS string creation (665µs) is slower
than deferred WasmString wrappers (281µs) because String.fromCharCode
has high per-string overhead.

Kept WasmString approach: 1 WASM call (batch ptr/len) + N createGCString.
Batch SIMD UTF-16 export retained for future use when eager strings needed.
